name: Laine Industries — Website Intake → Factory HQ

parameters.content:
## Laine Industries — Website Intake → Factory HQ

Receives website form submissions forwarded by laineindustries.co `/api/intake`, normalizes the form type (contact / short-intake / full-intake), maps them to the Factory HQ inbound contract, and POSTs to Factory HQ as ONE warm-inbound opportunity.

**No secrets in this file.** The Factory secret lives in a Header Auth credential named "Factory Inbound Secret" (header `x-radar-secret`) that you attach to the "Send to Factory HQ" node after import.

Inbound capture only — no email to the prospect, no sending, no billing, no project start. Works while Factory HQ is paused.

meta.description: Website form -> /api/intake -> this workflow -> Factory HQ warm-inbound opportunity. Sanitized: no credentials or secrets embedded.
